title: Marketing Associate
description:
We are seeking an experienced Marketing professional to join our Meta Singapore to execute the business marketing strategy for key solutions that impact all our platforms.

The person that fills this role will be responsible for cross-platform business narrative and programs across APAC by partnering with global teams and in country marketing leaders. The person will leverage communication skills, an eye for visually powerful communication, and the ability to work across a broad range of marketing programs/projects to collaborate with product marketers, country marketing managers and sales leaders. The candidate will need to combine strategic-thinking, creativity and a hands-on approach to successfully execute on high-impact, scalable ideas and campaigns.

Responsibilities

  • Drive strategic leadership in developing agentic AI marketing channels (chat, conversational AI, autonomous agents) that deliver demonstrable business impact
  • Establish measurement frameworks and learning agendas to optimize AI-driven marketing channels through experimentation, A/B testing, and advanced analytics
  • Influence cross-functional partners across Product, Marketing, and Sales teams to align on AI-first marketing channel experiences
  • Mentor and guide team members on agentic marketing approaches, building organizational rigor in AI-driven customer engagement
  • Drive innovation in conversational marketing, prompt engineering, and autonomous marketing agent development

Minimum Qualifications

  • 8+ years of digital marketing experience, driving performance marketing results at scale
  • Expertise in multiple digital marketing channels such as email, search, display, Meta Ads, and chat
  • Analytical foundation including SQL, statistical analysis, and experience designing/executing marketing experiments
  • Knowledge of agentic AI systems, autonomous agents, or conversational AI development
  • Cross-functional leadership experience influencing and partnering with Product, Engineering, Data Science, and Sales teams
  • Strategic thinking and experience developing long-term strategy while executing tactical initiatives

Preferred Qualifications

  • Technical experience in prompt engineering, agent development, or AI model evaluation
  • Experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Agentforce, or similar marketing automation platforms
  • Background in growth marketing, performance marketing, or marketing technology roles
  • Advanced analytics experience with causal inference, machine learning, or predictive modeling
  • Experience driving organizational change and innovation in marketing


Meta builds technologies that help people connect, find communities, and grow businesses. When Facebook launched in 2004, it changed the way people connect. Apps like Messenger, Instagram and WhatsApp further empowered billions around the world. Now, Meta is moving beyond 2D screens toward immersive experiences like augmented and virtual reality to help build the next evolution in social technology. People who choose to build their careers by building with us at Meta help shape a future that will take us beyond what digital connection makes possible today—beyond the constraints of screens, the limits of distance, and even the rules of physics.
